name: Robbie Lee
title: Software Engineer | Computer Science Student
bio: Passionate about application development, game development, and problem solving.

projects.title: Simple Terminal
projects.description: An interactive, browser-based terminal simulator featuring custom command parsing, directory navigation, and a virtual file system structure.

projects.title: Voxel World Generator
projects.description: A procedural 10x10 voxel world engine built with physics-based player movement, collision detection, and dynamic chunk loading.

projects.title: Everyday CLI
projects.description: A helpful Command Line Interface that you can use to takes notes, track events, and set reminders.

experience.description: Working with a team developing, testing, and publishing apps and websites for Sheriffs and Police Departments across the United States.

As an Operation Supervisor at Auburn Recreation and Wellness I supervised shift employees, oversaw safety and policy enforcement of members and guests, and managed University events that happened within the facility.

experience.role: Light Crew for AU Marching Band
experience.description: While in the marching band I assembled, fixed, tested, and distributed lighting rigs used during shows such as "Viva La France" and "Game On". The light crew consisted of a small group of band members who stayed after hours to get lighting rigs ready for shows.
